title: The Fight Moves Underwater
description: On pages 18–21, the fight moves underwater focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.
scene: On pages 18–21, the fight moves underwater focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Get the hell back up here, you damn fish!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Whether underwater or land, the basic difference in our strength remains unchanged.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Not only that, you've invoked my wrath now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I shall kill you with the essence of fishman karate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Earlier on, I sent you flying with my "100 tile smashing true punch."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But your chances of surviving my ultimate technique *1000 tile smashing true punch* is... Zoro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you say you would take from me...?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
